outcome_summary: Ninth routine fire of the T-SEED-QA seed-graph QA census. Scored shard 09 — 27 pedagogical_prerequisite edges (C1) + 20 nodes (C2/C3) per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric — and wrote seed_qa_evidence/shard_09.md. Findings: C1 0/27 defective = 0.0% (the census's FOURTH 0-defect shard after 04/06/07; 25 Sound, 2 Defensible — E-2 modus_ponens->propositional_logic and E-26 propositional_knowledge->knowledge, both instances of the recurring 'target is the more general/foundational concept' shape held at Defensible on concrete-entry-point readings (informal MP exposure preceding formal PL for E-2; everyday usage 'I know that' as entry to the genus knowledge for E-26); 0 Reversed, 0 Weak-redundant). C2 0/20 fail. C3 5/20 fail = 25.0% — N-6 causal_exclusion_argument (non-reductive-physicalism/supervenence/epiphenomenalism framework-gated), N-7 chisholm_paradox (SDL acronym undefined load-bearing, same shape as shard 05 N-8), N-8 bayes_theorem (formula + probability-theory jargon load-bearing, same shape as shard 06 N-16), N-16 representationalism_perception (phenomenal-character ungated; contrast shard 07 N-7 which PASSED with the gloss), N-19 modal_systems_hierarchy (K/T/S4/S5 + accessibility relation framework-gated). FIFTH consecutive shard with the C3 jargon-gating cluster (shards 05/06/07/08/09); the five-instance count is composition-driven (the shard's high concentration of technical-philosophy nodes) rather than authoring drift. The localized authoring differences across adjacent representationalism nodes are striking — shard 07 N-7 representationalism_consciousness PASSED because phenomenal character was glossed as 'what it is like to have an experience'; shard 09 N-16 representationalism_perception FAILED because the same term is ungated. Pattern strong enough now that the SQA-20 closeout should articulate a clear authoring rule: load-bearing first sentence may use technical terms but must gloss each one inline. One audit-touched edge — E-16 expertise->epistemic_dependence, kept-with-annotation by migration 0063 (weak-edge cleanup pass) — scored Sound on audit-validated direction; the audit's keep-with-evidence-annotation decision explicitly endorses the concrete-entry-point reading. Running C1 across shards 01-09: 10.7% / 3.6% / 3.6% / 0.0% / 3.7% / 0.0% / 0.0% / 3.7% / 0.0%; cumulative 23/245 = 9.4%, firmly under the production audit's 13% baseline. Defensible count 2 (counts across shards 04-09: 1/4/6/3/1/2) — over-Defensible-drift watch item is not worsening. Candidate findings only; disposition is the SQA-20 closeout. SQA-09 marked complete; SQA-10 next. No in-band Issues. mempalace_zero_citations_after_search fires because the boot search surfaced 0 drawers above the 0.60 threshold across all three formulations — the same benign shape every prior census shard saw; the evidence file and diary reference prior shards (05/06/07/08) and the production audit (S-0122) as named-session references rather than drawer-ID citations. 0 validator hard-fails (50 checks on --final-check).
